summary: Iter 38 Business Model Pivot (Wallet/Escrow/Withdrawal removal) fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest passing (6 baseline test_iter38_wallet_removal + 8 extended coverage + 1 full booking+mock-payment flow). Frontend: landing hero copy, customer dashboard, artist dashboard, admin dashboard, and booking flow all confirmed compliant with the new lead-gen model.

backend_validation.auth_me_no_wallet: PASS — /api/auth/me for admin, customer, artist has no `wallet` field
backend_validation.admin_stats_new_kpis: PASS — platform_revenue, gst_collected, subscription_revenue, boost_revenue, bookTalent_total_collected, pending_refunds all present with numeric values; `escrow` and `pending_payouts` fully removed
backend_validation.invoice_pdf: PASS — /api/bookings/{id}/invoice returns application/pdf, %PDF header, non-empty body (>500 bytes)
backend_validation.booking_mock_payment_flow: PASS — Full flow: POST /api/bookings (with mandatory add-on PW_Sound_Setup) → /api/payments/init (razorpay_mock) → /api/payments/verify (mock_otp 123456) → booking becomes payment_status=token_paid, status=pending_artist, amount_paid=₹1,823. No wallet key appears in /auth/me afterwards. Invoice PDF renders for the freshly paid booking.

frontend_validation.landing_hero_copy: PASS — 'Transparent 5% platform fee, verified artists, direct settlement with your artist' present; no 'escrow' or 'wallet' text on landing
frontend_validation.customer_dashboard: PASS — /customer route renders; sidebar has Overview, My Bookings, Reviews, Messages, Find Artists — NO Wallet tab. Bookings table shows Invoice download button on paid bookings (visible in screenshot).
frontend_validation.artist_dashboard: PASS — /artist route renders; sidebar has Overview, Profile, Packages, Add-ons, Media, Availability, Bookings, Insights, Reviews, Boost Profile, Subscription, Concierge, KYC — NO Wallet tab.
frontend_validation.admin_dashboard: PASS — /admin route renders; sidebar has Refunds (NOT Payouts/Withdrawals). Overview KPIs visible in screenshot: Marketplace GMV ₹16,92,200, Bookings 113, Users 60, BookTalent Total Collected ₹1,67,970, Platform Service Fee (5%) ₹84,610, GST Collected (18%) ₹83,360, Subscription Revenue ₹0, Boost Revenue ₹0, Refunds Pending 0, KYC Pending 0, Open Disputes 0, Avg. Artist Rating 4.8. No Escrow, no Pending Payouts, no Wallet.
frontend_validation.booking_flow_payment_methods: PASS — BookingFlow.jsx L573-578 shows only 3 methods: 💳 Card / 📲 UPI / 🏦 Bank. No 👛 Wallet option. Sidebar of live booking flow explicitly displays new model breakdown: 'Artist Performance Fee ₹60,900 (settled directly Customer↔Artist)' + 'Platform Service Fee (5%) ₹3,045' + 'GST (18% on Platform Fee) ₹548' + 'Amount Payable to BookTalent ₹3,593'.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2608 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider extracting bookings, payments, admin, contracts, and PDFs into dedicated route modules under /app/backend/routes/ (partial split has already begun with routes/disputes.py, routes/addons.py, etc.). Not blocking but tech-debt to track.

test_iter38_wallet_removal.py hard-codes `http://localhost:8001` as fallback for REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — per system guidelines, backend tests should fail-fast if env is missing rather than silently pointing to localhost. Low-severity.

Legacy backend tests (test_iter13, test_iter14, backend_test.py, etc.) still exercise removed /api/wallet endpoints and will emit noise on any full-suite run. Consider deleting or gating them with @pytest.mark.skip('iter38: wallet removed') for future clarity. Main agent has already flagged this in the review request.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 UI scenarios verified visually + at source level)

test_credentials: admin@booktalent.com / Admin@123, customer@booktalent.com / Customer@123, priya@booktalent.com / Artist@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_iter38 bookings via pytest (BT-260718-EBB8C4 and BT-260718-3B20C3, both ₹1,823 token paid, event 2026-10-16 Mumbai). Prefixed TEST_iter38 for easy cleanup. Data is safe to leave — validates the paid-booking path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 38 pivot is fully green. Priya's artist_id = 22c3967c-e432-41e8-bdfb-a0a54b82ee1b, one mandatory addon (PW_Sound_Setup, ₹5,000) required in any Priya booking. Booking detail endpoint /api/bookings/{id} returns nested {booking: {...}, artist, artist_profile, customer} — always unwrap `body['booking']` before checking amount_paid/payment_status. Search endpoint is /api/artists/search (not /api/artists). Payment mock OTP is 123456. All Iter 38 tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env and finish in ~5s combined.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 13 review-request checks pass.
